title: Update Incident Status And Fetch Attachments - Securonix
content:
This playbook fetches the attachments for the incident. Also, it updates the state of the Securonix incident based on the configuration provided in integration configuration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Securonix pack (Securonix, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: UpdateSecuronixIncidentStatus, securonix-incident-attachment-get, securonix-xsoar-state-mapping-get.
